settings.title: A Day in the Life of Our Nurses
settings.excerpt: Long before the vet sees your pet, our nurses are the steady hands holding everything together.
settings.body:
When you bring your animal to Tailside, you meet the vet for a few minutes. What you do not always see is everything our nurses do around that visit.

They prep for surgery and monitor every patient as they wake, often sitting with a frightened animal until it is calm. They run the clinics for weight, nutrition, and post operative checks.

Our head nurse, Claire, has been comforting nervous dogs here for eleven years and can settle almost any patient. Newer to the team, Ben has a gift with cats that the rest of us quietly envy.

Next time you visit, know that the people in scrubs are the reason your pet is in such safe hands.
